# Working title: Tide Tables and Small Harbours

## Introduction

Why local harbours matter to regional trade and what this book will prove.

## Section 1 — History of Blackwater Pier

The pier was built in 1847. Records show three major reconstructions.

### 1.1 Early ledgers

Original tide measurements were kept by hand until 1922.

### 1.2 The 1968 collapse

Structural failure during a storm exposed fraudulent maintenance logs.

## Section 2 — Modern harbour administration

How tide schedules are compiled today and where errors enter the system.

## Section 3 — Case study: forged schedules

Evidence from the Blackwater archive and what investigators missed.

## Conclusion

Recommendations for independent audit of harbour records.
